class.name: BTConditionAS_EventOccurred
class.brief_description: BTCondition that checks if an Ability System event occurred recently.
class.description: A Behavior Tree condition that checks if an [ASEventTag] occurred within a time window using the Events Historical buffer. Returns [code]BT.SUCCESS[/code] if event found, [code]BT.FAILURE[/code] otherwise.

method.name: get_event_tag
method.description: Returns the event tag to check for.

method.name: get_time_window
method.description: Returns the time window for event detection (seconds).

method.name: set_event_tag
method.description: Sets the event tag to check for.

method.name: set_time_window
method.description: Sets the time window (how far back to check for the event).
